## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] New / updated connector (MCP)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I confirm **no secrets or PII are included** (no API keys, tokens, passwords,
      real names, client data, or local absolute paths).
- [ ] Connectors read all credentials from the environment — nothing is hardcoded.
- [ ] I ran the checks locally (`py_compile` on Python, gitleaks secret scan).
- [ ] CI is green (secret scan + lint).
- [ ] This change is focused on a single feature or fix.
- [ ] I read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and agree to the
      [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
